commands.review_summary:
The PR changes QQBot outbound dispatch to flush buffered non-streaming tool text/media when a block or final reply is silent, and adds dispatcher regression tests.

PR surface: Source +113, Tests +129. Total +242 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main buffers non-streaming tool output and has no QQBot onSkip/onSettled path for skipped silent replies; the PR adds a focused dispatcher regression. I did not run a live QQBot group turn in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR has no narrow automated repair target; the remaining action is maintainer or QQBot-owner sign-off on the live message-delivery risk.
